name: Thal-Tealglide
personality: A shimmering tiny-duck-hatted snail whose · eyes carry the quiet glow of someone who has refactored a monolith and emerged serene. Thal-Tealglide's wisdom is warm and steady — chaos is a dialect it has never learned to speak.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
